description.value:
One-of-a-kind artifact of polished pink and translucent quartz, roughly hand-sized. Center cluster of pink quartz (1+ inches diameter) deepens from light pink to deep orchid. True origin unknown. Fell into Roman hands after fall of Carthage (185 B.C.); vanished after Scipio's death in 129 B.C.; rumored sightings in Hadrumetum (114 B.C.) and Hippo Regius (78 B.C.). Requires 24 hours to attune to new host. Grants 360-degree passive vision (+1 die to Spot Hidden), cannot be surprised awake, perceives invisible beings as ghostly pink. Initially causes 1/1D2 SAN loss and 1D4 days of severe headaches, nausea, dizziness (-2 dice to movement). First invisible/non-corporeal encounter requires 1/1D6 SAN check; subsequent encounters require 0/1 SAN check, risking eventual madness.

TypeMagical Artifact
Used ByAnyone
Effect360-degree vision; +1 bonus die to Spot Hidden; cannot be surprised while awake; see invisible/non-corporeal beings as ghostly pink forms; causes disorientation and acclimatization penalties; eventual madness risk from continued use
